introSection: Vesuvio Volcano is a steel roller coaster located at Fantawild Adventure in Taishan, Tai'an, Shandong, China.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The first car has only one row, making the total number of riders 26, not 30.

sections.title: Etymology
sections.content: Mount Vesuvius is a volcano located in Italy which erupted in AD 79. The eruption destroyed many settlements including the ancient city of Pompeii.

fullText:
Vesuvio Volcano is a steel roller coaster located at Fantawild Adventure in Taishan, Tai'an, Shandong, China.



The first car has only one row, making the total number of riders 26, not 30.

Mount Vesuvius is a volcano located in Italy which erupted in AD 79. The eruption destroyed many settlements including the ancient city of Pompeii.
